llm_response:
Subject: Request for Extension on Project Submission

Dear Professor Henderson,

I am writing to respectfully request a short extension for my upcoming project, which is currently due in two days. I sincerely apologize for this late notice and any inconvenience this may cause to your grading schedule. Unfortunately, I am facing significant challenges that prevent me from completing the work by the current deadline.

First, I have encountered an unexpected technical issue with my primary research database, which delayed my data collection phase. Second, I have been dealing with a sudden family emergency that required my immediate attention over the past forty-eight hours. These combined circumstances have made it impossible for me to finalize the analysis and write the final report by the original deadline.

I am confident that I can submit a high-quality project by the end of next week. I have already drafted the introduction and methodology sections, and I am working diligently to complete the remaining parts. I would greatly appreciate the opportunity to resubmit my work under these new conditions. Please let me know if this extension is feasible or if there are other options available to me.

Thank you very much for your time, understanding, and continued support throughout this semester.

Sincerely,

Jordan Lee
Student ID: 458921
